title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode is greyed out during a call, then returns to normal after call ends on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Set ANC to ON and select either Adaptive or Standard mode.
5. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF (no value selected).
7. During the call, observe the ANC status — verify it remains ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard).
8. During the call, observe the Transparency Mode option — verify it is greyed out and inaccessible.
9. During the call, tap on Transparency Mode — verify a popup appears stating the option is unavailable during a call.
11. After the call ends, verify ANC remains ON with the previously selected value (Adaptive or Standard).
12. After the call ends, verify Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected.
13. Verify that the user can now toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: ANC remains ON with the previously selected option during and after the call. Transparency Mode is greyed out and inaccessible during the call, and tapping it shows a popup stating it is unavailable during a call. After the call, ANC stays ON with the selected value, Transparency Mode stays OFF with no value selected, and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
